feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Inbound and outbound service for Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition. An integration between POKA and SAP is necessary for us.

We have been using the "Maintenance Notification" Inbound API lately to prove the payload from POKA and create the notification on SAP. The notification has been successfully created in SAP.

1. By returning the notification number to POKA, we must receive an acknowledgement of the notification that was made on SAP. Hope it will be a outbound service (We are not sure).

2. In addition, whenever there is a change in the notification status, it must also be reflected on the POKA.

Would you kindly recommend

Is it possible to utilize the same "Maintenance Notification" API for acknowledgment?and the status changes to be sent back to POKA ?

Could you please suggest us a Outbound API for this purpose. 

Is it possible to utilize the same API for Inbound and outbound services?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP Process Integration 

Regards,

Yaswanth.

entry.title: Execute SQL statement on SAP PO and then export CSV file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on SAP PO single stack 7.5 and we have extracted message count for SAP PO 7.5 using Message overview. I got to know that there is another way, would allow even better analysis by also considering message size. Could you please help me to know on how to execute SQL statement on SAP PO 7.5 single stack? What level of access is needed to do so? what tools/softwares to be installed to do that? Should we take help from Basis team who has SAP PO server level access?

CREATE TABLE Z_BC_MSG AS (SELECT MSG_ID,DIRECTION,TO_PARTY_NAME,TO_PARTY_TYPE,FROM_PARTY_NAME,FROM_PARTY_TYPE,TO_SERVICE_NAME,TO_SERVICE_TYPE,FROM_SERVICE_NAME,FROM_SERVICE_TYPE,BYTES_LENGTH,RECV_ACTION_NAME,RECV_ACTION_TYPE,SCENARIO_ID FROM BC_MSG)

and then we need to export Z_BC_MSG as CSV file?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: "How to Correctly Convert JSON to XML for OData v2 Adapter in SAP CPI for S/4HANA SaleOrder API Req"
entry.content:
I am working on an integration scenario in SAP CPI where I need to call the S/4HANA System A_SalesOrder API. The API works perfectly fine with JSON payload when tested in Postman. However, when implementing this integration using the OData v2 adapter in CPI with the same JSON request payload, I encounter the following error:

"An internal server error occurred: Request Payload Parsing Failed. Possible reasons include: (1) The OData metadata content available on the server might be outdated, or (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1), org.xmlpull.v1.XmlPullParserException: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1)."

In an attempt to resolve this, I converted the JSON payload to XML and sent it, but now I receive a different error:

"An internal server error occurred: Request Payload Parsing Failed. Possible reasons include: (1) The OData metadata content available on the server might be outdated, or (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details: Parsing exception for XML node <Material>, com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: The XML is malformed at node <Material>."

I have found a blog that discusses converting JSON to XML for this purpose: Posting Sales Orders into S/4HANA Cloud API - Part 2. However, I am unsure about the exact XML structure needed. Can someone provide detailed guidance on how to correctly convert JSON to XML for this scenario and ensure it meets the requirements of the OData v2 adapter?

 

when I tried from postman it is working 

but I tried from cpi useing json getting error

req payload :

{
    "SalesOrderType": "OR",
    "SalesOrganization": "MBSO",
    "DistributionChannel": "MC",
    "OrganizationDivision": "MD",
    "SoldToParty": "3200000043",
    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "alk",
    "TransactionCurrency": "INR",
    "to_Item": {
        "results": [
            {
                "SalesOrderItem": "10",
                "Material": "81",
                "RequestedQuantity": "10",
                "ProductionPlant": "MBP1",
                "to_ScheduleLine": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ScheduleLine": "1",
                            "ScheduleLineOrderQuantity": "10"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                "to_PricingElement": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ConditionType": "PRMB",
                            "ConditionCurrency": "INR",
                            "ConditionQuantity": "10",
                            "ConditionRateValue": "150.0000"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    },
    "to_Partner": {
        "results": [
            {
                "PartnerFunction": "SP",
                "Customer": "3200000006"
            },
            {
                "PartnerFunction": "BP",
                "Customer": "3200000006"
            }
        ]
    }
}
 
error:

 

so I have converted to xml still getting some error like :

 

so I found one blog this one :#https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/posting-sales-orders-into-s-4hana-cloud-api-part-2/ba-p/13353053

so in this blog I found request xml mapping like this 

I changed the xml structure accrodingly so my structure look like this 

<A_SalesOrder>
    <A_SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrderType>OR</SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrganization>MBSO</SalesOrganization>
        <DistributionChannel>MC</DistributionChannel>
        <OrganizationDivision>MD</OrganizationDivision>
        <SoldToParty>3200000043</SoldToParty>
        <PurchaseOrderByCustomer>AleranT</PurchaseOrderByCustomer>
        <TransactionCurrency>INR</TransactionCurrency>
        <to_Item>
            <A_SalesOrderItemType>
                <SalesOrderItem>10</SalesOrderItem>
                <Material>81</Material>
                <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                <ProductionPlant>MBP1</ProductionPlant>
                <to_ScheduleLine>
                    <results>
                        <ScheduleLine>1</ScheduleLine>
                        <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                    </results>
                </to_ScheduleLine>
                <to_PricingElement>
                    <results>
                        <ConditionType>PRMB</ConditionType>
                        <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue>
                    </results>
                </to_PricingElement>
            </A_SalesOrderItemType>
        </to_Item>
        <to_Partner>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>SP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>BP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
        </to_Partner>
    </A_SalesOrderType>
</A_SalesOrder>
 
but still getting node parsing error because of some field like 
  <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue> 
but in that blog I cant see the proper xml fieldname for this three so I simple removed and tried. so my structure look like this 
 
<A_SalesOrder>
    <A_SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrderType>OR</SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrganization>MBSO</SalesOrganization>
        <DistributionChannel>MC</DistributionChannel>
        <OrganizationDivision>MD</OrganizationDivision>
        <SoldToParty>3200000043</SoldToParty>
        <PurchaseOrderByCustomer>AleranT</PurchaseOrderByCustomer>
        <TransactionCurrency>INR</TransactionCurrency>
        <to_Item>
            <A_SalesOrderItemType>
                <SalesOrderItem>10</SalesOrderItem>
                <Material>81</Material>
                <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                <ProductionPlant>MBP1</ProductionPlant>
                <to_ScheduleLine>
                    <results>
                        <ScheduleLine>1</ScheduleLine>
                        <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                    </results>
                </to_ScheduleLine>
                <to_PricingElement>
                    <results>
                        <ConditionType>PRMB</ConditionType>
                       
                    </results>
                </to_PricingElement>
            </A_SalesOrderItemType>
        </to_Item>
        <to_Partner>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>SP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>BP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
        </to_Partner>
    </A_SalesOrderType>
</A_SalesOrder>  
 
 
so useing this structure to I can able to create sale order Sucessfully but still I need those three fields   <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue>
 
so how to find out the proper xml request format   plz anyone help me to find out this Thank you
 
@SAPSupport @MartyMcCormick  @Chr_Vogler  @pascalrenet   @Ryan-Crosby

entry.title: PI7.5 can be Installabled operating system versions?SUSE15?
entry.content: The current PI7.50 is installed on SUSE11 SP4. Since it is an older version, can it be migrated to SUSE15?

entry.title: SAP PO inboundRA configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP guys .

I have one simple question , e.g an ERP system wants to send IDOC to SAP PO and we have requirement to configure inboundRA connection , so there are 3 different clients on ERP so do we need to configure 3 cloned RA for that or one inboundRA ADAPTER will work ?  Please help to clarify 

Regards

Ashish Goswami

entry.title: kate AMQP channel in error in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have sender 3rd party Kate AMQP sender channel polling in error in SAP PO like shown below.

Could you please recommend the corrective actions to resolve the issue?

Error code:

no connection to broker check start/stop logs, last known error:error during establishing connection to AMQP server with channel:AMQP_XXXXXX, error :readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class org.apache.qpid.jms.provider.exceptions.ProviderIOException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class io.netty.channel.unix.Errors$NativeIoException)| |

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Client Proxy - WS SOAP with different namespace for QAS & PRD
entry.content:
Hello to all!

I'm facing the following issue:

I'm consuming a WS SOAP using Client Proxy. This solution is in PRD System already.
The Web Service provider will change the namespace of the WS and will have a different one for QAS and PRD system.

What are the best aproach to solve this:

1. How can I change the namespace of an existing proxy?
Do I have to create it again from scratch?

2. Since the namespace in the Client Proxy is created in DEV System and cannot be change in QAS and PRD system, how is the best way to handle this?
Do I need to have two different Client Proxy and use one or another depending the system?

 

Thanks, Pablo

entry.title: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario: Proxy(SOAP) -JDBC(PostgreSQL)

When we are sending the data from SAP ==>SAP PO==> JDBC (PostgreSQL) but its failing in PO

Getting an error as below.

Unable to execute statement for table or stored procedure. ‘Offices’ (Structure ’Statement’) due to org.postgresql.util.PSQLException:ERROR: relation “offices” does not exist

Position: 8

So can you please help us how to send data to PostgreSQL from SAP PO?

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.title: File stored in Ready Folder is not processing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an issue with LDAP authentication in MDM 7.1 initiation (.INI) File.

Log Detail
Log-on failure: LDAP Error, userName = Admin User not found

We are trying to replace the existing system ID with a different user.

1. Do we need to encrypt the password in the initiation file, Can We set-up the password attribute directly (without encryption).

2. What encryption method is being used between MDM7.1 and LDAP?

Thanks

entry.title: Exercises SAP PI PO
entry.content:
hello everyone,

can you tell me where I can find some exercises to do as training, for creating flows on sap pi/po?
thank you

entry.title: SAP PI NW7.5 upgrade and split (ctc wizards for PI split)
entry.content:
Hi,

We performed upgrade of SAP dual stack PI NW 7.40 to SAP PI NW 7.5 followed by Split procedure.

We followed upgrade guide, see attached, page 62, 

f the former SAP PI system is a dual-stack implementa­tion, you must carry out after the upgrade of SAP PI to SAP NetWeaver 7.5 the dual-stack-split using the soft­ware provisioning manager for the dual stack-split pro­cedure and the PI Upgrade CTC Wizard for the configu­ration adjustment.

1 - upgrade

2 - split

3 - trying to run PI Upgrade EHP Wizard and it failing.

SAP note DIGITS , see attached, have different sequence: Upgrade, Wizard, Split.

So, 2 documents have different information.

Since Upgrade and split is already done, we are seeking your help on completing PI Upgrade EHP Wizard.

According to the note below, the Wizard cannot be run after split.

Kind regards,

PERSON_NAME.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi,

We are struggling to integrate a standard OData API (Condition Record for Pricing in Sales - API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV) residing on an S/4HANA private cloud system. Both an OData and REST adapter are being used, but both throw an error.

I loaded the EDMX into an Integration Suite tenant to get an XSD out of it. That one is being used in the mapping.

OData

  • End point should be fine: http://<host>:<port>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV
  • Operation = CREATE
  • Resource path = A_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
  • Batch processing enabled
  • Additional parameter ContentTypeEncoding set to none

When testing, nothing can be observed on the S/4HANA side. This is the error in the SAP PO monitoring: The payload is not an entity object.

REST

  • XSRF token usage enabled
  • End point (so batch processing enabled I assume): http://<host>:<port>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV/$batch
  • Content Type set in the HTTP header: Content-Type = application/json

Message delivered to S/4HANA, but I see an HTTP 415 in the SAP PO Monitoring. On the S/4HANA side: this is the error in the response:  The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format.

Pointers and insights are welcome!

Many thanks.
Dimitri

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping - Context issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where i need to check if else condition of child nodes from first occurance of parent node. Below is my source structure:

<IDOC>
<E1KNA1M>  (0 to 1)
<E1KNVVM> (0 to unbounded)
<E1KNVPM> (0 to unbounded)
<PARVW>AG</PARVW> (0 to 1)
<KUNN2>111</KUNN2> (0 to 1) 
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>222</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
<KUNN2>333</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>444</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
</E1KNA1M>
</IDOC>

Here i need populate KUNN2 to target if PARVW is equal to ZN only from first occurance of E1KNVVM. i should suppress if there is a PARVW with ZN from any other E1KNVVM occurances. copy Value[0] will not work in this case as PARVW is inside E1KNVVM and has multiple occurances. Could you please help how can we achive this. Thanks in advance.

Thanks,

Sailaja.

entry.title: Migrate Java Mapping from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Posted as a blog. Will share the blog link here soon.

entry.title: Databricks jdbc 10220 Driver doesn't support this optional feature
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to connect to Azure Databricks DB using JDBC sender adapter from SAP PO 7.5 single stack.

We have installed the Azure Databricks driver on SAP PO server using the link provided by Azure..

But, still we get the following error while pinging the JDBC sender channel from monitoring page.

Could you please guide if you have such experience while connecting to Azure Databricks DB from SAP PO.. thank you!

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Message Definition like Service interface in Sproxy in SAP ERP when using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We currently have SAP PI system and we have integrated it with SAP ERP and CRM.

We use lot of ABAP proxies to connect SAP systems with SAP PI.

Now we are replacing SAP PI with cloud-based Integration Suite.

Need help in couple of questions:

1. New interface: There is XI adapter in Integration Suite but how does one create message definition like Service Interface, Message type, etc definition in SAP systems like ERP and CRM as there is no ESR in Intergration Suite?

2. Existing interfaces: how does one use existing ABAP proxy interfaces or transform them as we will not have ESR and SLD of SAP PI after switch to IS.

Thanks in advance.

Sunit

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Backend
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This is regarding the inbound messages received from partner systems.. pls see below message flow.. 

Partners system --> SAP PO --> SAP Backend(ECC/S4HANA) 

SAP PO message status shows successful but still SAP backend guys say that message has not arrived in AIF monitoring (not visible on AIF monitoring).. Mostly we are using Proxy/IDOC interfaces.. Can you please suggest where all should we monitor on SAP backend (like sxmb_moni, etc..,) ? pls mention all the tcodes separately for both IDOC/Proxy messages so that we could troubleshoot further? 

Could you please let me know what all should be monitored on SAP Backend until it shows up in AIF?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: URGENT : Has Anyone Integrated SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for SSO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently leading a project to integrate SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for Single Sign-On (SSO). Our setup involves KeyCloak acting as the Identity Provider (IDP) for frontline users, who are already authenticated into another application via KeyCloak. We now need to extend this authentication mechanism to SuccessFactors.

Current Setup:

  • KeyCloak is fully operational, and we have a realm where users already exists
  • SAP SuccessFactors is already installed and running,

Objective:

We want to allow frontline users to authenticate into SAP SuccessFactors using KeyCloak as the IDP. KeyCloak supports both SAML and OIDC, but we’re leaning toward using SAML for this integration.

Request:

Has anyone in the community attempted or completed a similar integration? If so, could you share:

  • Best practices for configuring SAML-based SSO between KeyCloak and SAP SuccessFactors?
  • Any specific configurations or challenges encountered on the SAP SuccessFactors side?
  • Recommendations for handling user mapping and security considerations in this setup?

Any guidance, documentation, or tips would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Ashish Sharam

entry.title: SAP PI Mapping help: Duplicate Idoc - continue Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you help with the below issue related to PI mapping logic.

Requirement: Source file structure
Target IDoc
in the current design: Target Idoc node is duplicated for a flag field and additional Idocs are generated.
Eg:
I have 3 employee ID's 2247,2799,5832
2247 has 3 records -> 3 Idocs are generated and It has a field flag as Y for two records, so additional 2 idocs are generated
2799 - 1 record -> 1 Idoc is generated with flag as N
5832 - 2 records -> 2 Idocs are generated It has a field flag as Y for one record, so additional 1 idoc is generated

So in total 3 + 2 + 1 + 2 + 1 = 9 Idocs are generated.

In the target Structure, there is a field Record_Seq which has the values as
These Idocs are generated by the 1st Occurance of Idoc node
2247_01
2247_02
2247_03
2799_01
5832_01
5832_02


As I mention earlier, Idoc node is duplicated where Additional Idocs are generated based on Flag Y,  sequence is as below
2247_01
2247_01
5832_01
5832_01

Expected Sequence in the Above Idocs is

2247_04
2247_05
5832_03
5832_04
Basically, I want to continue Idoc sequence in the 2nd Idoc node occurence, please advise how to achieve it

entry.title: How to get data sent from Gmail in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Since SAP Integration Suite can use IMAP and POP3 protocols, how can I use these protocols to receive emails in CPI?
What are the requirements for the sender side? If you have any experience with this, please respond.
